skeletons.template:
IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. HELLOWORLD.
       AUTHOR. Your Name.
       DATE-WRITTEN. Today's Date.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.

       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01  WS-MESSAGE          PIC X(20) VALUE 'Hello, World!'.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
       MAIN-PARAGRAPH.
           DISPLAY WS-MESSAGE.
           STOP RUN.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. READFILE.
       AUTHOR. Your Name.
       DATE-WRITTEN. Today's Date.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.
       FILE-CONTROL.
           SELECT INPUT-FILE ASSIGN TO 'INPUT.DAT'
           ORGANIZATION IS LINE SEQUENTIAL
           FILE STATUS IS WS-FILE-STATUS.

       DATA DIVISION.
       FILE SECTION.
       FD  INPUT-FILE.
       01  INPUT-RECORD        PIC X(80).

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01  WS-FILE-STATUS      PIC XX.
           88  FILE-OK         VALUE '00'.
           88  FILE-EOF        VALUE '10'.
       01  WS-RECORD-COUNT     PIC 9(5) VALUE ZERO.
       01  WS-EOF-FLAG         PIC X VALUE 'N'.
           88  END-OF-FILE     VALUE 'Y'.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           OPEN INPUT INPUT-FILE
           IF NOT FILE-OK
               DISPLAY 'ERROR OPENING FILE: ' WS-FILE-STATUS
               STOP RUN
           END-IF

           PERFORM READ-FILE-LOOP UNTIL END-OF-FILE
           CLOSE INPUT-FILE
           DISPLAY 'TOTAL RECORDS PROCESSED: ' WS-RECORD-COUNT
           STOP RUN.

       READ-FILE-LOOP.
           READ INPUT-FILE
           AT END
               SET END-OF-FILE TO TRUE
           NOT AT END
               ADD 1 TO WS-RECORD-COUNT
               PERFORM PROCESS-RECORD
           END-READ.

       PROCESS-RECORD.
           DISPLAY 'RECORD ' WS-RECORD-COUNT ': ' INPUT-RECORD.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. WRITEFILE.
       AUTHOR. Your Name.
       DATE-WRITTEN. Today's Date.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.
       FILE-CONTROL.
           SELECT OUTPUT-FILE ASSIGN TO 'OUTPUT.DAT'
           ORGANIZATION IS LINE SEQUENTIAL
           FILE STATUS IS WS-FILE-STATUS.

       DATA DIVISION.
       FILE SECTION.
       FD  OUTPUT-FILE.
       01  OUTPUT-RECORD       PIC X(80).

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01  WS-FILE-STATUS      PIC XX.
           88  FILE-OK         VALUE '00'.
       01  WS-COUNTER          PIC 9(3) VALUE 1.
       01  WS-OUTPUT-LINE      PIC X(80).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           OPEN OUTPUT OUTPUT-FILE
           IF NOT FILE-OK
               DISPLAY 'ERROR OPENING FILE: ' WS-FILE-STATUS
               STOP RUN
           END-IF

           PERFORM WRITE-RECORDS VARYING WS-COUNTER FROM 1 BY 1
               UNTIL WS-COUNTER > 10
           CLOSE OUTPUT-FILE
           DISPLAY 'FILE CREATED SUCCESSFULLY'
           STOP RUN.

       WRITE-RECORDS.
           STRING 'RECORD NUMBER ' WS-COUNTER ' - SAMPLE DATA'
               DELIMITED BY SIZE
               INTO WS-OUTPUT-LINE
           MOVE WS-OUTPUT-LINE TO OUTPUT-RECORD
           WRITE OUTPUT-RECORD
           IF NOT FILE-OK
               DISPLAY 'ERROR WRITING RECORD: ' WS-FILE-STATUS
           END-IF.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. INDEXFILE.
       AUTHOR. Your Name.
       DATE-WRITTEN. Today's Date.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.
       FILE-CONTROL.
           SELECT MASTER-FILE ASSIGN TO 'MASTER.DAT'
           ORGANIZATION IS INDEXED
           ACCESS MODE IS RANDOM
           RECORD KEY IS EMPLOYEE-ID
           FILE STATUS IS WS-FILE-STATUS.

       DATA DIVISION.
       FILE SECTION.
       FD  MASTER-FILE.
       01  EMPLOYEE-RECORD.
           05  EMPLOYEE-ID     PIC 9(6).
           05  EMPLOYEE-NAME   PIC X(30).
           05  EMPLOYEE-DEPT   PIC X(10).
           05  EMPLOYEE-SALARY PIC 9(7)V99.

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01  WS-FILE-STATUS      PIC XX.
           88  FILE-OK         VALUE '00'.
           88  RECORD-FOUND    VALUE '00'.
           88  RECORD-NOT-FOUND VALUE '23'.
       01  WS-SEARCH-ID        PIC 9(6).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           OPEN I-O MASTER-FILE
           IF NOT FILE-OK
               DISPLAY 'ERROR OPENING FILE: ' WS-FILE-STATUS
               STOP RUN
           END-IF

           DISPLAY 'ENTER EMPLOYEE ID TO SEARCH: '
           ACCEPT WS-SEARCH-ID
           MOVE WS-SEARCH-ID TO EMPLOYEE-ID
           
           READ MASTER-FILE
           EVALUATE WS-FILE-STATUS
               WHEN '00'
                   PERFORM DISPLAY-EMPLOYEE
               WHEN '23'
                   DISPLAY 'EMPLOYEE NOT FOUND'
               WHEN OTHER
                   DISPLAY 'ERROR READING FILE: ' WS-FILE-STATUS
           END-EVALUATE

           CLOSE MASTER-FILE
           STOP RUN.

       DISPLAY-EMPLOYEE.
           DISPLAY 'EMPLOYEE ID: ' EMPLOYEE-ID
           DISPLAY 'NAME: ' EMPLOYEE-NAME
           DISPLAY 'DEPARTMENT: ' EMPLOYEE-DEPT
           DISPLAY 'SALARY: ' EMPLOYEE-SALARY.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. SALESRPT.
       AUTHOR. Your Name.
       DATE-WRITTEN. Today's Date.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.
       FILE-CONTROL.
           SELECT SALES-FILE ASSIGN TO 'SALES.DAT'
           ORGANIZATION IS LINE SEQUENTIAL
           FILE STATUS IS WS-FILE-STATUS.
           SELECT REPORT-FILE ASSIGN TO 'REPORT.TXT'
           ORGANIZATION IS LINE SEQUENTIAL.

       DATA DIVISION.
       FILE SECTION.
       FD  SALES-FILE.
       01  SALES-RECORD.
           05  SALESMAN-ID     PIC 9(4).
           05  SALESMAN-NAME   PIC X(20).
           05  SALES-AMOUNT    PIC 9(7)V99.
           05  SALES-DATE      PIC 9(8).

       FD  REPORT-FILE.
       01  REPORT-LINE         PIC X(80).

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01  WS-FILE-STATUS      PIC XX.
           88  FILE-OK         VALUE '00'.
           88  FILE-EOF        VALUE '10'.
       01  WS-EOF-FLAG         PIC X VALUE 'N'.
           88  END-OF-FILE     VALUE 'Y'.
       01  WS-LINE-COUNT       PIC 99 VALUE ZERO.
       01  WS-PAGE-COUNT       PIC 99 VALUE 1.
       01  WS-TOTAL-SALES      PIC 9(9)V99 VALUE ZERO.

       01  WS-HEADER-LINE.
           05  FILLER          PIC X(30) VALUE 'SALES REPORT - PAGE '.
           05  WS-PAGE-NO      PIC Z9.
           05  FILLER          PIC X(46) VALUE SPACES.

       01  WS-DETAIL-LINE.
           05  WS-DET-ID       PIC 9999.
           05  FILLER          PIC X(5) VALUE SPACES.
           05  WS-DET-NAME     PIC X(20).
           05  FILLER          PIC X(5) VALUE SPACES.
           05  WS-DET-AMOUNT   PIC $$,$$$,$$9.99.
           05  FILLER          PIC X(5) VALUE SPACES.
           05  WS-DET-DATE     PIC 99/99/9999.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           OPEN INPUT SALES-FILE
           OPEN OUTPUT REPORT-FILE
           IF NOT FILE-OK
               DISPLAY 'ERROR OPENING FILES'
               STOP RUN
           END-IF

           PERFORM PRINT-HEADER
           PERFORM PROCESS-RECORDS UNTIL END-OF-FILE
           PERFORM PRINT-TOTAL
           CLOSE SALES-FILE REPORT-FILE
           STOP RUN.

       PROCESS-RECORDS.
           READ SALES-FILE
           AT END
               SET END-OF-FILE TO TRUE
           NOT AT END
               PERFORM PRINT-DETAIL
               ADD SALES-AMOUNT TO WS-TOTAL-SALES
           END-READ.

       PRINT-HEADER.
           MOVE WS-PAGE-COUNT TO WS-PAGE-NO
           MOVE WS-HEADER-LINE TO REPORT-LINE
           WRITE REPORT-LINE
           MOVE SPACES TO REPORT-LINE
           WRITE REPORT-LINE
           MOVE 'ID    NAME                 AMOUNT      DATE' TO REPORT-LINE
           WRITE REPORT-LINE
           MOVE ALL '-' TO REPORT-LINE
           WRITE REPORT-LINE
           MOVE 4 TO WS-LINE-COUNT.

       PRINT-DETAIL.
           IF WS-LINE-COUNT > 50
               ADD 1 TO WS-PAGE-COUNT
               PERFORM PRINT-HEADER
           END-IF
           MOVE SALESMAN-ID TO WS-DET-ID
           MOVE SALESMAN-NAME TO WS-DET-NAME
           MOVE SALES-AMOUNT TO WS-DET-AMOUNT
           MOVE SALES-DATE TO WS-DET-DATE
           MOVE WS-DETAIL-LINE TO REPORT-LINE
           WRITE REPORT-LINE
           ADD 1 TO WS-LINE-COUNT.

       PRINT-TOTAL.
           MOVE SPACES TO REPORT-LINE
           WRITE REPORT-LINE
           STRING 'TOTAL SALES: ' WS-TOTAL-SALES
               DELIMITED BY SIZE INTO REPORT-LINE
           WRITE REPORT-LINE.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. VALIDATE.
       AUTHOR. Your Name.
       DATE-WRITTEN. Today's Date.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.
       FILE-CONTROL.
           SELECT INPUT-FILE ASSIGN TO 'INPUT.DAT'
           ORGANIZATION IS LINE SEQUENTIAL
           FILE STATUS IS WS-INPUT-STATUS.
           SELECT VALID-FILE ASSIGN TO 'VALID.DAT'
           ORGANIZATION IS LINE SEQUENTIAL
           FILE STATUS IS WS-VALID-STATUS.
           SELECT ERROR-FILE ASSIGN TO 'ERRORS.DAT'
           ORGANIZATION IS LINE SEQUENTIAL
           FILE STATUS IS WS-ERROR-STATUS.

       DATA DIVISION.
       FILE SECTION.
       FD  INPUT-FILE.
       01  INPUT-RECORD.
           05  INP-CUSTOMER-ID PIC X(6).
           05  INP-CUSTOMER-NAME PIC X(25).
           05  INP-AMOUNT      PIC X(10).
           05  INP-DATE        PIC X(8).
           05  FILLER          PIC X(31).

       FD  VALID-FILE.
       01  VALID-RECORD        PIC X(80).

       FD  ERROR-FILE.
       01  ERROR-RECORD        PIC X(120).

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01  WS-INPUT-STATUS     PIC XX.
           88  INPUT-OK        VALUE '00'.
           88  INPUT-EOF       VALUE '10'.
       01  WS-VALID-STATUS     PIC XX.
       01  WS-ERROR-STATUS     PIC XX.
       01  WS-EOF-FLAG         PIC X VALUE 'N'.
           88  END-OF-FILE     VALUE 'Y'.

       01  WS-COUNTERS.
           05  WS-TOTAL-COUNT  PIC 9(6) VALUE ZERO.
           05  WS-VALID-COUNT  PIC 9(6) VALUE ZERO.
           05  WS-ERROR-COUNT  PIC 9(6) VALUE ZERO.

       01  WS-VALIDATION-FLAGS.
           05  WS-ID-VALID     PIC X VALUE 'Y'.
           05  WS-NAME-VALID   PIC X VALUE 'Y'.
           05  WS-AMOUNT-VALID PIC X VALUE 'Y'.
           05  WS-DATE-VALID   PIC X VALUE 'Y'.
           05  WS-RECORD-VALID PIC X VALUE 'Y'.

       01  WS-ERROR-MESSAGE    PIC X(40).
       01  WS-NUMERIC-AMOUNT   PIC 9(8)V99.
       01  WS-NUMERIC-DATE     PIC 9(8).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           OPEN INPUT INPUT-FILE
           OPEN OUTPUT VALID-FILE ERROR-FILE

           PERFORM PROCESS-RECORDS UNTIL END-OF-FILE

           CLOSE INPUT-FILE VALID-FILE ERROR-FILE
           
           DISPLAY 'VALIDATION SUMMARY:'
           DISPLAY 'TOTAL RECORDS: ' WS-TOTAL-COUNT
           DISPLAY 'VALID RECORDS: ' WS-VALID-COUNT
           DISPLAY 'ERROR RECORDS: ' WS-ERROR-COUNT
           STOP RUN.

       PROCESS-RECORDS.
           READ INPUT-FILE
           AT END
               SET END-OF-FILE TO TRUE
           NOT AT END
               ADD 1 TO WS-TOTAL-COUNT
               PERFORM VALIDATE-RECORD
               IF WS-RECORD-VALID = 'Y'
                   ADD 1 TO WS-VALID-COUNT
                   MOVE INPUT-RECORD TO VALID-RECORD
                   WRITE VALID-RECORD
               ELSE
                   ADD 1 TO WS-ERROR-COUNT
                   PERFORM WRITE-ERROR-RECORD
               END-IF
           END-READ.

       VALIDATE-RECORD.
           MOVE 'Y' TO WS-RECORD-VALID
           
           * VALIDATE CUSTOMER ID
           IF INP-CUSTOMER-ID = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
               MOVE 'N' TO WS-RECORD-VALID
               MOVE 'CUSTOMER ID IS BLANK' TO WS-ERROR-MESSAGE
           END-IF
           
           * VALIDATE CUSTOMER NAME
           IF INP-CUSTOMER-NAME = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
               MOVE 'N' TO WS-RECORD-VALID
               MOVE 'CUSTOMER NAME IS BLANK' TO WS-ERROR-MESSAGE
           END-IF
           
           * VALIDATE AMOUNT
           IF FUNCTION TEST-NUMVAL(INP-AMOUNT) NOT = 0
               MOVE 'N' TO WS-RECORD-VALID
               MOVE 'INVALID AMOUNT FORMAT' TO WS-ERROR-MESSAGE
           ELSE
               COMPUTE WS-NUMERIC-AMOUNT = FUNCTION NUMVAL(INP-AMOUNT)
               IF WS-NUMERIC-AMOUNT <= 0
                   MOVE 'N' TO WS-RECORD-VALID
                   MOVE 'AMOUNT MUST BE GREATER THAN ZERO' TO WS-ERROR-MESSAGE
               END-IF
           END-IF
           
           * VALIDATE DATE
           IF FUNCTION TEST-NUMVAL(INP-DATE) NOT = 0
               MOVE 'N' TO WS-RECORD-VALID
               MOVE 'INVALID DATE FORMAT' TO WS-ERROR-MESSAGE
           END-IF.

       WRITE-ERROR-RECORD.
           STRING INPUT-RECORD ' | ERROR: ' WS-ERROR-MESSAGE
               DELIMITED BY SIZE INTO ERROR-RECORD
           WRITE ERROR-RECORD.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. SORTFILE.
       AUTHOR. Your Name.
       DATE-WRITTEN. Today's Date.

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.
       FILE-CONTROL.
           SELECT INPUT-FILE ASSIGN TO 'UNSORTED.DAT'
           ORGANIZATION IS LINE SEQUENTIAL
           FILE STATUS IS WS-INPUT-STATUS.
           SELECT OUTPUT-FILE ASSIGN TO 'SORTED.DAT'
           ORGANIZATION IS LINE SEQUENTIAL
           FILE STATUS IS WS-OUTPUT-STATUS.
           SELECT SORT-WORK ASSIGN TO 'SORTWORK'.

       DATA DIVISION.
       FILE SECTION.
       FD  INPUT-FILE.
       01  INPUT-RECORD        PIC X(80).

       FD  OUTPUT-FILE.
       01  OUTPUT-RECORD       PIC X(80).

       SD  SORT-WORK.
       01  SORT-RECORD.
           05  SORT-KEY        PIC X(10).
           05  SORT-DATA       PIC X(70).

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01  WS-INPUT-STATUS     PIC XX.
           88  INPUT-OK        VALUE '00'.
           88  INPUT-EOF       VALUE '10'.
       01  WS-OUTPUT-STATUS    PIC XX.
           88  OUTPUT-OK       VALUE '00'.
       01  WS-RECORD-COUNT     PIC 9(6) VALUE ZERO.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           SORT SORT-WORK
               ON ASCENDING KEY SORT-KEY
               USING INPUT-FILE
               GIVING OUTPUT-FILE.

           IF RETURN-CODE = 0
               DISPLAY 'SORT COMPLETED SUCCESSFULLY'
               PERFORM COUNT-OUTPUT-RECORDS
               DISPLAY 'RECORDS SORTED: ' WS-RECORD-COUNT
           ELSE
               DISPLAY 'SORT FAILED WITH RETURN CODE: ' RETURN-CODE
           END-IF

           STOP RUN.

       COUNT-OUTPUT-RECORDS.
           OPEN INPUT OUTPUT-FILE
           PERFORM UNTIL INPUT-EOF
               READ OUTPUT-FILE
               AT END
                   SET INPUT-EOF TO TRUE
               NOT AT END
                   ADD 1 TO WS-RECORD-COUNT
               END-READ
           END-PERFORM
           CLOSE OUTPUT-FILE.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. DATEUTIL.
       AUTHOR. Your Name.
       DATE-WRITTEN. Today's Date.
       * UTILITY SUBROUTINE FOR DATE FUNCTIONS

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.

       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01  WS-WORK-AREAS.
           05  WS-YEAR         PIC 9(4).
           05  WS-MONTH        PIC 99.
           05  WS-DAY          PIC 99.
           05  WS-LEAP-YEAR    PIC X VALUE 'N'.
               88  IS-LEAP-YEAR VALUE 'Y'.

       01  WS-DAYS-IN-MONTH    PIC 99 OCCURS 12 TIMES
           VALUE 31, 28, 31, 30, 31, 30, 31, 31, 30, 31, 30, 31.

       LINKAGE SECTION.
       01  LS-FUNCTION-CODE    PIC X(2).
           88  VALIDATE-DATE   VALUE 'VD'.
           88  FORMAT-DATE     VALUE 'FD'.
           88  ADD-DAYS        VALUE 'AD'.
       01  LS-INPUT-DATE       PIC 9(8).  * YYYYMMDD
       01  LS-OUTPUT-DATE      PIC X(10). * MM/DD/YYYY
       01  LS-RETURN-CODE      PIC 9(2).
           88  SUCCESSFUL      VALUE 00.
           88  INVALID-DATE    VALUE 01.
           88  INVALID-FUNCTION VALUE 02.
       01  LS-DAYS-TO-ADD      PIC S9(4) COMP.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION USING LS-FUNCTION-CODE
                                LS-INPUT-DATE
                                LS-OUTPUT-DATE
                                LS-RETURN-CODE
                                LS-DAYS-TO-ADD.

       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           EVALUATE TRUE
               WHEN VALIDATE-DATE
                   PERFORM VALIDATE-DATE-ROUTINE
               WHEN FORMAT-DATE
                   PERFORM FORMAT-DATE-ROUTINE
               WHEN ADD-DAYS
                   PERFORM ADD-DAYS-ROUTINE
               WHEN OTHER
                   SET INVALID-FUNCTION TO TRUE
           END-EVALUATE
           
           GOBACK.

       VALIDATE-DATE-ROUTINE.
           MOVE LS-INPUT-DATE(1:4) TO WS-YEAR
           MOVE LS-INPUT-DATE(5:2) TO WS-MONTH
           MOVE LS-INPUT-DATE(7:2) TO WS-DAY
           
           IF WS-MONTH < 1 OR WS-MONTH > 12
               SET INVALID-DATE TO TRUE
               EXIT PARAGRAPH
           END-IF
           
           PERFORM CHECK-LEAP-YEAR
           
           IF IS-LEAP-YEAR AND WS-MONTH = 2
               IF WS-DAY < 1 OR WS-DAY > 29
                   SET INVALID-DATE TO TRUE
               ELSE
                   SET SUCCESSFUL TO TRUE
               END-IF
           ELSE
               IF WS-DAY < 1 OR WS-DAY > WS-DAYS-IN-MONTH(WS-MONTH)
                   SET INVALID-DATE TO TRUE
               ELSE
                   SET SUCCESSFUL TO TRUE
               END-IF
           END-IF.

       FORMAT-DATE-ROUTINE.
           PERFORM VALIDATE-DATE-ROUTINE
           IF SUCCESSFUL
               STRING WS-MONTH '/' WS-DAY '/' WS-YEAR
                   DELIMITED BY SIZE INTO LS-OUTPUT-DATE
           END-IF.

       ADD-DAYS-ROUTINE.
           * SIMPLIFIED ADD DAYS ROUTINE
           PERFORM VALIDATE-DATE-ROUTINE
           IF SUCCESSFUL
               COMPUTE LS-INPUT-DATE = LS-INPUT-DATE + LS-DAYS-TO-ADD
               PERFORM FORMAT-DATE-ROUTINE
           END-IF.

       CHECK-LEAP-YEAR.
           MOVE 'N' TO WS-LEAP-YEAR
           IF FUNCTION MOD(WS-YEAR, 4) = 0
               IF FUNCTION MOD(WS-YEAR, 100) = 0
                   IF FUNCTION MOD(WS-YEAR, 400) = 0
                       SET IS-LEAP-YEAR TO TRUE
                   END-IF
               ELSE
                   SET IS-LEAP-YEAR TO TRUE
               END-IF
           END-IF.

       END PROGRAM DATEUTIL.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. EMPUPDATE.
       AUTHOR. Your Name.
       DATE-WRITTEN. Today's Date.
       * EMPLOYEE UPDATE PROGRAM USING COPYBOOKS

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.
       FILE-CONTROL.
           SELECT EMPLOYEE-FILE ASSIGN TO 'EMPLOYEE.DAT'
           ORGANIZATION IS INDEXED
           ACCESS MODE IS RANDOM
           RECORD KEY IS EMP-ID
           FILE STATUS IS WS-FILE-STATUS.

       DATA DIVISION.
       FILE SECTION.
       FD  EMPLOYEE-FILE.
           COPY EMPLOYEE-RECORD.   * COPYBOOK FOR RECORD LAYOUT

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
           COPY WS-COMMON.         * COPYBOOK FOR COMMON VARIABLES
           
       01  WS-FILE-STATUS          PIC XX.
           88  FILE-OK             VALUE '00'.
           88  RECORD-NOT-FOUND    VALUE '23'.
           
       01  WS-USER-INPUT.
           05  WS-INPUT-EMP-ID     PIC 9(6).
           05  WS-INPUT-NAME       PIC X(30).
           05  WS-INPUT-SALARY     PIC 9(7)V99.
           
       01  WS-MENU-CHOICE          PIC X.
           88  ADD-EMPLOYEE        VALUE 'A'.
           88  UPDATE-EMPLOYEE     VALUE 'U'.
           88  DELETE-EMPLOYEE     VALUE 'D'.
           88  DISPLAY-EMPLOYEE    VALUE 'S'.
           88  EXIT-PROGRAM        VALUE 'X'.

       * COPYBOOK CONTENT WOULD BE:
       * EMPLOYEE-RECORD COPYBOOK:
       * 01  EMPLOYEE-RECORD.
       *     05  EMP-ID              PIC 9(6).
       *     05  EMP-NAME            PIC X(30).
       *     05  EMP-DEPARTMENT      PIC X(10).
       *     05  EMP-SALARY          PIC 9(7)V99.
       *     05  EMP-HIRE-DATE       PIC 9(8).
       *     05  EMP-STATUS          PIC X.
       *         88  ACTIVE          VALUE 'A'.
       *         88  INACTIVE        VALUE 'I'.

       * WS-COMMON COPYBOOK:
       * 01  WS-CURRENT-DATE         PIC 9(8).
       * 01  WS-CURRENT-TIME         PIC 9(6).
       * 01  WS-PROGRAM-NAME         PIC X(8) VALUE 'EMPUPDATE'.
       * 01  WS-ERROR-MESSAGES.
       *     05  WS-FILE-ERROR       PIC X(50) VALUE
       *         'ERROR ACCESSING EMPLOYEE FILE'.
       *     05  WS-INVALID-INPUT    PIC X(50) VALUE
       *         'INVALID INPUT - PLEASE TRY AGAIN'.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           ACCEPT WS-CURRENT-DATE FROM DATE YYYYMMDD
           ACCEPT WS-CURRENT-TIME FROM TIME
           
           OPEN I-O EMPLOYEE-FILE
           IF NOT FILE-OK
               DISPLAY WS-FILE-ERROR
               STOP RUN
           END-IF
           
           PERFORM DISPLAY-MENU UNTIL EXIT-PROGRAM
           
           CLOSE EMPLOYEE-FILE
           STOP RUN.

       DISPLAY-MENU.
           DISPLAY ' '
           DISPLAY 'EMPLOYEE MAINTENANCE SYSTEM'
           DISPLAY '============================'
           DISPLAY 'A - ADD EMPLOYEE'
           DISPLAY 'U - UPDATE EMPLOYEE'
           DISPLAY 'D - DELETE EMPLOYEE'
           DISPLAY 'S - SEARCH EMPLOYEE'
           DISPLAY 'X - EXIT'
           DISPLAY ' '
           DISPLAY 'ENTER CHOICE: ' WITH NO ADVANCING
           ACCEPT WS-MENU-CHOICE
           
           EVALUATE TRUE
               WHEN ADD-EMPLOYEE
                   PERFORM ADD-EMPLOYEE-ROUTINE
               WHEN UPDATE-EMPLOYEE
                   PERFORM UPDATE-EMPLOYEE-ROUTINE
               WHEN DELETE-EMPLOYEE
                   PERFORM DELETE-EMPLOYEE-ROUTINE
               WHEN DISPLAY-EMPLOYEE
                   PERFORM SEARCH-EMPLOYEE-ROUTINE
               WHEN EXIT-PROGRAM
                   DISPLAY 'GOODBYE!'
               WHEN OTHER
                   DISPLAY WS-INVALID-INPUT
           END-EVALUATE.

       ADD-EMPLOYEE-ROUTINE.
           DISPLAY 'ENTER EMPLOYEE ID: ' WITH NO ADVANCING
           ACCEPT WS-INPUT-EMP-ID
           MOVE WS-INPUT-EMP-ID TO EMP-ID
           
           READ EMPLOYEE-FILE
           IF FILE-OK
               DISPLAY 'EMPLOYEE ALREADY EXISTS'
           ELSE
               DISPLAY 'ENTER EMPLOYEE NAME: ' WITH NO ADVANCING
               ACCEPT WS-INPUT-NAME
               MOVE WS-INPUT-NAME TO EMP-NAME
               DISPLAY 'ENTER SALARY: ' WITH NO ADVANCING
               ACCEPT WS-INPUT-SALARY
               MOVE WS-INPUT-SALARY TO EMP-SALARY
               MOVE WS-CURRENT-DATE TO EMP-HIRE-DATE
               SET ACTIVE TO TRUE
               WRITE EMPLOYEE-RECORD
               IF FILE-OK
                   DISPLAY 'EMPLOYEE ADDED SUCCESSFULLY'
               ELSE
                   DISPLAY 'ERROR ADDING EMPLOYEE'
               END-IF
           END-IF.

       UPDATE-EMPLOYEE-ROUTINE.
           DISPLAY 'ENTER EMPLOYEE ID TO UPDATE: ' WITH NO ADVANCING
           ACCEPT WS-INPUT-EMP-ID
           MOVE WS-INPUT-EMP-ID TO EMP-ID
           
           READ EMPLOYEE-FILE
           IF FILE-OK
               DISPLAY 'CURRENT NAME: ' EMP-NAME
               DISPLAY 'ENTER NEW NAME (OR PRESS ENTER TO KEEP): '
               ACCEPT WS-INPUT-NAME
               IF WS-INPUT-NAME NOT = SPACES
                   MOVE WS-INPUT-NAME TO EMP-NAME
               END-IF
               REWRITE EMPLOYEE-RECORD
               IF FILE-OK
                   DISPLAY 'EMPLOYEE UPDATED SUCCESSFULLY'
               END-IF
           ELSE
               DISPLAY 'EMPLOYEE NOT FOUND'
           END-IF.

       DELETE-EMPLOYEE-ROUTINE.
           DISPLAY 'ENTER EMPLOYEE ID TO DELETE: ' WITH NO ADVANCING
           ACCEPT WS-INPUT-EMP-ID
           MOVE WS-INPUT-EMP-ID TO EMP-ID
           
           READ EMPLOYEE-FILE
           IF FILE-OK
               DISPLAY 'DELETE ' EMP-NAME '? (Y/N): ' WITH NO ADVANCING
               ACCEPT WS-MENU-CHOICE
               IF WS-MENU-CHOICE = 'Y' OR 'y'
                   DELETE EMPLOYEE-FILE
                   DISPLAY 'EMPLOYEE DELETED'
               END-IF
           ELSE
               DISPLAY 'EMPLOYEE NOT FOUND'
           END-IF.

       SEARCH-EMPLOYEE-ROUTINE.
           DISPLAY 'ENTER EMPLOYEE ID TO SEARCH: ' WITH NO ADVANCING
           ACCEPT WS-INPUT-EMP-ID
           MOVE WS-INPUT-EMP-ID TO EMP-ID
           
           READ EMPLOYEE-FILE
           IF FILE-OK
               DISPLAY 'EMPLOYEE FOUND:'
               DISPLAY 'ID: ' EMP-ID
               DISPLAY 'NAME: ' EMP-NAME
               DISPLAY 'DEPARTMENT: ' EMP-DEPARTMENT
               DISPLAY 'SALARY: ' EMP-SALARY
               DISPLAY 'HIRE DATE: ' EMP-HIRE-DATE
               DISPLAY 'STATUS: ' EMP-STATUS
           ELSE
               DISPLAY 'EMPLOYEE NOT FOUND'
           END-IF.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. TABLEPROC.
       AUTHOR. Your Name.
       DATE-WRITTEN. Today's Date.
       * DEMONSTRATES TABLE PROCESSING AND SEARCHING

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.

       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01  WS-STATE-TABLE.
           05  WS-STATE-ENTRY OCCURS 50 TIMES
                              ASCENDING KEY IS STATE-CODE
                              INDEXED BY STATE-IDX.
               10  STATE-CODE      PIC X(2).
               10  STATE-NAME      PIC X(20).
               10  STATE-CAPITAL   PIC X(15).

       01  WS-TABLE-SIZE           PIC 99 VALUE 5.
       01  WS-SEARCH-CODE          PIC X(2).
       01  WS-FOUND-FLAG           PIC X VALUE 'N'.
           88  RECORD-FOUND        VALUE 'Y'.
       01  WS-COUNTER              PIC 99.

       01  WS-SALES-TABLE.
           05  WS-MONTHLY-SALES OCCURS 12 TIMES PIC 9(7)V99.

       01  WS-MONTH-NAMES.
           05  FILLER              PIC X(9) VALUE 'JANUARY  '.
           05  FILLER              PIC X(9) VALUE 'FEBRUARY '.
           05  FILLER              PIC X(9) VALUE 'MARCH    '.
           05  FILLER              PIC X(9) VALUE 'APRIL    '.
           05  FILLER              PIC X(9) VALUE 'MAY      '.
           05  FILLER              PIC X(9) VALUE 'JUNE     '.
           05  FILLER              PIC X(9) VALUE 'JULY     '.
           05  FILLER              PIC X(9) VALUE 'AUGUST   '.
           05  FILLER              PIC X(9) VALUE 'SEPTEMBER'.
           05  FILLER              PIC X(9) VALUE 'OCTOBER  '.
           05  FILLER              PIC X(9) VALUE 'NOVEMBER '.
           05  FILLER              PIC X(9) VALUE 'DECEMBER '.
       01  WS-MONTH-TABLE REDEFINES WS-MONTH-NAMES.
           05  WS-MONTH-NAME OCCURS 12 TIMES PIC X(9).

       01  WS-TOTAL-SALES          PIC 9(9)V99 VALUE ZERO.
       01  WS-AVERAGE-SALES        PIC 9(7)V99.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           PERFORM LOAD-STATE-TABLE
           PERFORM LOAD-SALES-DATA
           PERFORM DISPLAY-MENU
           STOP RUN.

       LOAD-STATE-TABLE.
           MOVE 'AL' TO STATE-CODE(1)
           MOVE 'ALABAMA' TO STATE-NAME(1)
           MOVE 'MONTGOMERY' TO STATE-CAPITAL(1)
           
           MOVE 'AK' TO STATE-CODE(2)
           MOVE 'ALASKA' TO STATE-NAME(2)
           MOVE 'JUNEAU' TO STATE-CAPITAL(2)
           
           MOVE 'AZ' TO STATE-CODE(3)
           MOVE 'ARIZONA' TO STATE-NAME(3)
           MOVE 'PHOENIX' TO STATE-CAPITAL(3)
           
           MOVE 'CA' TO STATE-CODE(4)
           MOVE 'CALIFORNIA' TO STATE-NAME(4)
           MOVE 'SACRAMENTO' TO STATE-CAPITAL(4)
           
           MOVE 'FL' TO STATE-CODE(5)
           MOVE 'FLORIDA' TO STATE-NAME(5)
           MOVE 'TALLAHASSEE' TO STATE-CAPITAL(5).

       LOAD-SALES-DATA.
           MOVE 125000.00 TO WS-MONTHLY-SALES(1)
           MOVE 132000.00 TO WS-MONTHLY-SALES(2)
           MOVE 145000.00 TO WS-MONTHLY-SALES(3)
           MOVE 158000.00 TO WS-MONTHLY-SALES(4)
           MOVE 162000.00 TO WS-MONTHLY-SALES(5)
           MOVE 175000.00 TO WS-MONTHLY-SALES(6)
           MOVE 168000.00 TO WS-MONTHLY-SALES(7)
           MOVE 172000.00 TO WS-MONTHLY-SALES(8)
           MOVE 165000.00 TO WS-MONTHLY-SALES(9)
           MOVE 158000.00 TO WS-MONTHLY-SALES(10)
           MOVE 145000.00 TO WS-MONTHLY-SALES(11)
           MOVE 152000.00 TO WS-MONTHLY-SALES(12).

       DISPLAY-MENU.
           DISPLAY 'TABLE PROCESSING DEMO'
           DISPLAY '===================='
           DISPLAY '1. SEARCH STATE TABLE'
           DISPLAY '2. DISPLAY SALES REPORT'
           DISPLAY '3. CALCULATE SALES STATISTICS'
           DISPLAY ' '
           DISPLAY 'ENTER STATE CODE TO SEARCH: ' WITH NO ADVANCING
           ACCEPT WS-SEARCH-CODE
           
           PERFORM SEARCH-STATE-TABLE
           IF RECORD-FOUND
               DISPLAY 'STATE: ' STATE-NAME(STATE-IDX)
               DISPLAY 'CAPITAL: ' STATE-CAPITAL(STATE-IDX)
           ELSE
               DISPLAY 'STATE NOT FOUND'
           END-IF
           
           PERFORM DISPLAY-SALES-REPORT
           PERFORM CALCULATE-STATISTICS.

       SEARCH-STATE-TABLE.
           MOVE 'N' TO WS-FOUND-FLAG
           SEARCH WS-STATE-ENTRY
               AT END
                   CONTINUE
               WHEN STATE-CODE(STATE-IDX) = WS-SEARCH-CODE
                   SET RECORD-FOUND TO TRUE
           END-SEARCH.

       DISPLAY-SALES-REPORT.
           DISPLAY ' '
           DISPLAY 'MONTHLY SALES REPORT'
           DISPLAY '==================='.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-COUNTER FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-COUNTER > 12
               DISPLAY WS-MONTH-NAME(WS-COUNTER) ': 
                       WS-MONTHLY-SALES(WS-COUNTER)
           END-PERFORM.

       CALCULATE-STATISTICS.
           PERFORM VARYING WS-COUNTER FROM 1 BY 1 UNTIL WS-COUNTER > 12
               ADD WS-MONTHLY-SALES(WS-COUNTER) TO WS-TOTAL-SALES
           END-PERFORM
           DIVIDE WS-TOTAL-SALES BY 12 GIVING WS-AVERAGE-SALES
           
           DISPLAY ' '
           DISPLAY 'SALES STATISTICS:'
           DISPLAY 'TOTAL ANNUAL SALES:  WS-TOTAL-SALES
           DISPLAY 'AVERAGE MONTHLY SALES:  WS-AVERAGE-SALES.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. STRINGOPS.
       AUTHOR. Your Name.
       DATE-WRITTEN. Today's Date.
       * STRING MANIPULATION AND TEXT PROCESSING

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.

       DATA DIVISION.
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01  WS-INPUT-STRING         PIC X(100).
       01  WS-OUTPUT-STRING        PIC X(100).
       01  WS-WORK-STRING          PIC X(100).
       01  WS-TEMP-STRING          PIC X(100).
       
       01  WS-STRING-LENGTH        PIC 99.
       01  WS-POSITION             PIC 99.
       01  WS-WORD-COUNT           PIC 99 VALUE ZERO.
       01  WS-CHAR-COUNT           PIC 99 VALUE ZERO.
       
       01  WS-SEARCH-CHAR          PIC X.
       01  WS-REPLACE-CHAR         PIC X.
       01  WS-FOUND-COUNT          PIC 99 VALUE ZERO.
       
       01  WS-FIRST-NAME           PIC X(20).
       01  WS-LAST-NAME            PIC X(20).
       01  WS-FORMATTED-NAME       PIC X(50).
       
       01  WS-MENU-CHOICE          PIC X.
           88  UPPERCASE-OPTION    VALUE 'U'.
           88  LOWERCASE-OPTION    VALUE 'L'.
           88  REVERSE-OPTION      VALUE 'R'.
           88  REPLACE-OPTION      VALUE 'P'.
           88  COUNT-OPTION        VALUE 'C'.
           88  FORMAT-OPTION       VALUE 'F'.
           88  EXIT-OPTION         VALUE 'X'.

       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           PERFORM DISPLAY-MENU UNTIL EXIT-OPTION
           STOP RUN.

       DISPLAY-MENU.
           DISPLAY ' '
           DISPLAY 'STRING MANIPULATION UTILITY'
           DISPLAY '==========================='
           DISPLAY 'U - CONVERT TO UPPERCASE'
           DISPLAY 'L - CONVERT TO LOWERCASE'
           DISPLAY 'R - REVERSE STRING'
           DISPLAY 'P - REPLACE CHARACTERS'
           DISPLAY 'C - COUNT WORDS AND CHARACTERS'
           DISPLAY 'F - FORMAT NAME'
           DISPLAY 'X - EXIT'
           DISPLAY ' '
           DISPLAY 'ENTER CHOICE: ' WITH NO ADVANCING
           ACCEPT WS-MENU-CHOICE
           
           EVALUATE TRUE
               WHEN UPPERCASE-OPTION
                   PERFORM CONVERT-UPPERCASE
               WHEN LOWERCASE-OPTION
                   PERFORM CONVERT-LOWERCASE
               WHEN REVERSE-OPTION
                   PERFORM REVERSE-STRING
               WHEN REPLACE-OPTION
                   PERFORM REPLACE-CHARACTERS
               WHEN COUNT-OPTION
                   PERFORM COUNT-WORDS-CHARS
               WHEN FORMAT-OPTION
                   PERFORM FORMAT-NAME
               WHEN EXIT-OPTION
                   DISPLAY 'GOODBYE!'
               WHEN OTHER
                   DISPLAY 'INVALID CHOICE'
           END-EVALUATE.

       CONVERT-UPPERCASE.
           DISPLAY 'ENTER STRING: ' WITH NO ADVANCING
           ACCEPT WS-INPUT-STRING
           MOVE FUNCTION UPPER-CASE(WS-INPUT-STRING) TO WS-OUTPUT-STRING
           DISPLAY 'RESULT: ' WS-OUTPUT-STRING.

       CONVERT-LOWERCASE.
           DISPLAY 'ENTER STRING: ' WITH NO ADVANCING
           ACCEPT WS-INPUT-STRING
           MOVE FUNCTION LOWER-CASE(WS-INPUT-STRING) TO WS-OUTPUT-STRING
           DISPLAY 'RESULT: ' WS-OUTPUT-STRING.

       REVERSE-STRING.
           DISPLAY 'ENTER STRING: ' WITH NO ADVANCING
           ACCEPT WS-INPUT-STRING
           MOVE FUNCTION REVERSE(WS-INPUT-STRING) TO WS-OUTPUT-STRING
           DISPLAY 'RESULT: ' WS-OUTPUT-STRING.

       REPLACE-CHARACTERS.
           DISPLAY 'ENTER STRING: ' WITH NO ADVANCING
           ACCEPT WS-INPUT-STRING
           DISPLAY 'ENTER CHARACTER TO FIND: ' WITH NO ADVANCING
           ACCEPT WS-SEARCH-CHAR
           DISPLAY 'ENTER REPLACEMENT CHARACTER: ' WITH NO ADVANCING
           ACCEPT WS-REPLACE-CHAR
           
           MOVE ZERO TO WS-FOUND-COUNT
           MOVE WS-INPUT-STRING TO WS-WORK-STRING
           
           INSPECT WS-WORK-STRING TALLYING WS-FOUND-COUNT
               FOR ALL WS-SEARCH-CHAR
           INSPECT WS-WORK-STRING REPLACING ALL WS-SEARCH-CHAR
               BY WS-REPLACE-CHAR
               
           MOVE WS-WORK-STRING TO WS-OUTPUT-STRING
           DISPLAY 'RESULT: ' WS-OUTPUT-STRING
           DISPLAY 'REPLACEMENTS MADE: ' WS-FOUND-COUNT.

       COUNT-WORDS-CHARS.
           DISPLAY 'ENTER STRING: ' WITH NO ADVANCING
           ACCEPT WS-INPUT-STRING
           
           MOVE FUNCTION LENGTH(FUNCTION TRIM(WS-INPUT-STRING))
               TO WS-CHAR-COUNT
           
           * COUNT WORDS BY COUNTING SPACES AND ADDING 1
           MOVE ZERO TO WS-WORD-COUNT
           INSPECT WS-INPUT-STRING TALLYING WS-WORD-COUNT FOR ALL ' '
           IF WS-CHAR-COUNT > 0
               ADD 1 TO WS-WORD-COUNT
           END-IF
           
           DISPLAY 'CHARACTER COUNT: ' WS-CHAR-COUNT
           DISPLAY 'WORD COUNT: ' WS-WORD-COUNT.

       FORMAT-NAME.
           DISPLAY 'ENTER FIRST NAME: ' WITH NO ADVANCING
           ACCEPT WS-FIRST-NAME
           DISPLAY 'ENTER LAST NAME: ' WITH NO ADVANCING
           ACCEPT WS-LAST-NAME
           
           * FORMAT AS 'LAST, FIRST'
           STRING FUNCTION TRIM(WS-LAST-NAME) ', '
                  FUNCTION TRIM(WS-FIRST-NAME)
               DELIMITED BY SIZE
               INTO WS-FORMATTED-NAME
           END-STRING
           
           DISPLAY 'FORMATTED NAME: ' WS-FORMATTED-NAME
           
           * ALSO FORMAT AS PROPER CASE
           MOVE FUNCTION PROPER-CASE(
               FUNCTION TRIM(WS-FIRST-NAME)) TO WS-FIRST-NAME
           MOVE FUNCTION PROPER-CASE(
               FUNCTION TRIM(WS-LAST-NAME)) TO WS-LAST-NAME
           
           STRING WS-FIRST-NAME ' ' WS-LAST-NAME
               DELIMITED BY SIZE
               INTO WS-FORMATTED-NAME
           END-STRING
           
           DISPLAY 'PROPER CASE: ' WS-FORMATTED-NAME.

IDENTIFICATION DIVISION.
       PROGRAM-ID. ERRORHAND.
       AUTHOR. Your Name.
       DATE-WRITTEN. Today's Date.
       * COMPREHENSIVE ERROR HANDLING FRAMEWORK

       ENVIRONMENT DIVISION.
       INPUT-OUTPUT SECTION.
       FILE-CONTROL.
           SELECT INPUT-FILE ASSIGN TO 'INPUT.DAT'
           ORGANIZATION IS LINE SEQUENTIAL
           FILE STATUS IS WS-FILE-STATUS.
           SELECT LOG-FILE ASSIGN TO 'ERROR.LOG'
           ORGANIZATION IS LINE SEQUENTIAL
           FILE STATUS IS WS-LOG-STATUS.

       DATA DIVISION.
       FILE SECTION.
       FD  INPUT-FILE.
       01  INPUT-RECORD            PIC X(80).

       FD  LOG-FILE.
       01  LOG-RECORD              PIC X(120).

       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.
       01  WS-FILE-STATUS          PIC XX.
           88  FILE-SUCCESS        VALUE '00'.
           88  FILE-EOF            VALUE '10'.
           88  FILE-NOT-FOUND      VALUE '35'.
           88  PERMISSION-DENIED   VALUE '37'.
           88  DISK-FULL           VALUE '39'.

       01  WS-LOG-STATUS           PIC XX.
       01  WS-PROGRAM-STATUS       PIC 9(2) VALUE ZERO.
           88  NORMAL-END          VALUE 00.
           88  WARNING-END         VALUE 04.
           88  ERROR-END           VALUE 08.
           88  SEVERE-ERROR        VALUE 12.

       01  WS-ERROR-COUNTERS.
           05  WS-TOTAL-ERRORS     PIC 9(5) VALUE ZERO.
           05  WS-TOTAL-WARNINGS   PIC 9(5) VALUE ZERO.
           05  WS-RECORDS-PROCESSED PIC 9(7) VALUE ZERO.

       01  WS-CURRENT-DATETIME.
           05  WS-CURRENT-DATE     PIC 9(8).
           05  WS-CURRENT-TIME     PIC 9(8).

       01  WS-ERROR-MESSAGE        PIC X(80).
       01  WS-ERROR-SEVERITY       PIC X(8).
           88  INFO-LEVEL          VALUE 'INFO'.
           88  WARNING-LEVEL       VALUE 'WARNING'.
           88  ERROR-LEVEL         VALUE 'ERROR'.
           88  FATAL-LEVEL         VALUE 'FATAL'.

       01  WS-LOG-ENTRY.
           05  WS-LOG-TIMESTAMP    PIC X(19).
           05  FILLER              PIC X VALUE ' '.
           05  WS-LOG-SEVERITY     PIC X(8).
           05  FILLER              PIC X VALUE ' '.
           05  WS-LOG-MESSAGE      PIC X(80).

       PROCEDURE DIVISION.
       MAIN-PROCEDURE.
           ACCEPT WS-CURRENT-DATE FROM DATE YYYYMMDD
           ACCEPT WS-CURRENT-TIME FROM TIME
           
           PERFORM INITIALIZE-PROGRAM
           PERFORM MAIN-PROCESSING
           PERFORM CLEANUP-PROGRAM
           
           EVALUATE TRUE
               WHEN NORMAL-END
                   DISPLAY 'PROGRAM COMPLETED SUCCESSFULLY'
               WHEN WARNING-END
                   DISPLAY 'PROGRAM COMPLETED WITH WARNINGS'
               WHEN ERROR-END
                   DISPLAY 'PROGRAM COMPLETED WITH ERRORS'
               WHEN SEVERE-ERROR
                   DISPLAY 'PROGRAM TERMINATED DUE TO SEVERE ERROR'
           END-EVALUATE
           
           MOVE WS-PROGRAM-STATUS TO RETURN-CODE
           STOP RUN.

       INITIALIZE-PROGRAM.
           OPEN OUTPUT LOG-FILE
           IF NOT FILE-SUCCESS
               DISPLAY 'CANNOT OPEN LOG FILE - STATUS: ' WS-LOG-STATUS
               SET SEVERE-ERROR TO TRUE
               GOBACK
           END-IF
           
           SET INFO-LEVEL TO TRUE
           MOVE 'PROGRAM STARTED' TO WS-ERROR-MESSAGE
           PERFORM WRITE-LOG-ENTRY.

       MAIN-PROCESSING.
           OPEN INPUT INPUT-FILE
           EVALUATE WS-FILE-STATUS
               WHEN '00'
                   PERFORM PROCESS-FILE
               WHEN '35'
                   SET ERROR-LEVEL TO TRUE
                   MOVE 'INPUT FILE NOT FOUND' TO WS-ERROR-MESSAGE
                   PERFORM WRITE-LOG-ENTRY
                   SET ERROR-END TO TRUE
               WHEN OTHER
                   SET FATAL-LEVEL TO TRUE
                   STRING 'CANNOT OPEN INPUT FILE - STATUS: '
                          WS-FILE-STATUS
                       DELIMITED BY SIZE
                       INTO WS-ERROR-MESSAGE
                   END-STRING
                   PERFORM WRITE-LOG-ENTRY
                   SET SEVERE-ERROR TO TRUE
           END-EVALUATE
           
           CLOSE INPUT-FILE.

       PROCESS-FILE.
           PERFORM READ-AND-PROCESS UNTIL FILE-EOF OR SEVERE-ERROR.

       READ-AND-PROCESS.
           READ INPUT-FILE
           EVALUATE WS-FILE-STATUS
               WHEN '00'
                   ADD 1 TO WS-RECORDS-PROCESSED
                   PERFORM VALIDATE-RECORD
               WHEN '10'
                   CONTINUE
               WHEN OTHER
                   SET FATAL-LEVEL TO TRUE
                   STRING 'ERROR READING FILE - STATUS: '
                          WS-FILE-STATUS
                       DELIMITED BY SIZE
                       INTO WS-ERROR-MESSAGE
                   END-STRING
                   PERFORM WRITE-LOG-ENTRY
                   SET SEVERE-ERROR TO TRUE
           END-EVALUATE.

       VALIDATE-RECORD.
           IF INPUT-RECORD = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
               SET WARNING-LEVEL TO TRUE
               STRING 'EMPTY RECORD AT POSITION '
                      WS-RECORDS-PROCESSED
                   DELIMITED BY SIZE
                   INTO WS-ERROR-MESSAGE
               END-STRING
               PERFORM WRITE-LOG-ENTRY
               ADD 1 TO WS-TOTAL-WARNINGS
               SET WARNING-END TO TRUE
           ELSE
               PERFORM BUSINESS-VALIDATION
           END-IF.

       BUSINESS-VALIDATION.
           * ADD YOUR SPECIFIC VALIDATION LOGIC HERE
           IF INPUT-RECORD(1:1) NOT NUMERIC
               SET ERROR-LEVEL TO TRUE
               STRING 'INVALID RECORD FORMAT AT POSITION '
                      WS-RECORDS-PROCESSED
                   DELIMITED BY SIZE
                   INTO WS-ERROR-MESSAGE
               END-STRING
               PERFORM WRITE-LOG-ENTRY
               ADD 1 TO WS-TOTAL-ERRORS
               SET ERROR-END TO TRUE
           END-IF.

       WRITE-LOG-ENTRY.
           PERFORM FORMAT-TIMESTAMP
           MOVE WS-ERROR-SEVERITY TO WS-LOG-SEVERITY
           MOVE WS-ERROR-MESSAGE TO WS-LOG-MESSAGE
           
           MOVE WS-LOG-ENTRY TO LOG-RECORD
           WRITE LOG-RECORD
           
           IF NOT FILE-SUCCESS
               DISPLAY 'ERROR WRITING TO LOG FILE'
               SET SEVERE-ERROR TO TRUE
           END-IF.

       FORMAT-TIMESTAMP.
           STRING WS-CURRENT-DATE(1:4) '-'
                  WS-CURRENT-DATE(5:2) '-'
                  WS-CURRENT-DATE(7:2) ' '
                  WS-CURRENT-TIME(1:2) ':'
                  WS-CURRENT-TIME(3:2) ':'
                  WS-CURRENT-TIME(5:2)
               DELIMITED BY SIZE
               INTO WS-LOG-TIMESTAMP
           END-STRING.

       CLEANUP-PROGRAM.
           SET INFO-LEVEL TO TRUE
           STRING 'PROGRAM ENDED - RECORDS PROCESSED: '
                  WS-RECORDS-PROCESSED
                  ' WARNINGS: ' WS-TOTAL-WARNINGS
                  ' ERRORS: ' WS-TOTAL-ERRORS
               DELIMITED BY SIZE
               INTO WS-ERROR-MESSAGE
           END-STRING
           PERFORM WRITE-LOG-ENTRY
           
           CLOSE LOG-FILE.
